title: August 9
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 9''' is the 221st day of the year (222nd in leap years), with 144 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Rick Leonardi]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Kevin McKidd]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 27|''Star Wars Weekly'' 27]] published.
*[[1979]] – [[Michael Kingma]] is born.
*[[1994]] – [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 1|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 1]] published.
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars: Union (TPB)|''Star Wars: Union'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2001]] – ''[[Signal Interruption]]'' published at [[Wizards.com]].
*[[2005]] – [[Katie Johnson]] dies.
*[[2006]] – [[Rebellion 5|''Rebellion'' 5]] published.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Ascension]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 11|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 11]] published.
*2017 – [[Rogue One - Cassian & K-2SO Special 1|''Rogue One - Cassian & K-2SO Special'' 1]] published.
*2017 – "[[Flight of the Arrowhead]]" premieres on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2022]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Clone Wars Vol. 4]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge: Treasures from Batuu]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – [[Return of the Jedi – Max Rebo 1|''Return of the Jedi – Max Rebo'' 1]] published.
*2023 – [[Star Wars (2020) 37|''Star Wars'' (2020) 37]] published.
